description: إنشاء مجلد media-pipeline/fonts ونسخ خط Amiri-Bold.ttf إليه
command_preview: $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\fonts" ; if (-not (Test-Path $dest)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null ; Write-Host "Created directory: $dest" } else { Write-Host "Directory already exists: $dest" } ; $src = "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects\my-restaurant-app\boncoin\Amiri-Bold.ttf" ; Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dest -Force ; Write-Host 'Copied Amiri-Bold.ttf' ; Write-Host '=== VERIFY ===' ; Get-ChildItem -Path $dest | Select-Obj
output:
Created directory: C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\fonts
Copied Amiri-Bold.ttf
=== VERIFY ===

Name           Length
----           ------
Amiri-Bold.ttf 403996
